channel.title: 獸人控遊戲索引
channel.description: 「獸人控遊戲索引」致力於收集和索引 Furry 遊戲 - RSS Feed 將以時間順序推送最近新增或編輯的 30 個遊戲介面

item.title: Where The Demon Lurks
item.description:
Where the Demon Lurks is a visual novel where you are in the shoes of the newest Demon Lord, ruler of all corrupted souls in the Underworld, the most feared being that commands an army of demons and other unholy spawns of the earth. All that... and you're bored by every second of it.
The Underworld isn't what it used to be. The soul-crushing-soul-torturing mega corporation is hell-bent on processing corrupted souls. Inheriting this company that practically runs itself, the Demon Lord questions his purpose.
Find out what it's like to be a reluctant ruler and meet a cast of demons, angels and other magical and not-so-magical misfits. Just what kind of a Demon Lord will you be in the end?
About the Game
Where the Demon Lurks is a mostly kinetic visual novel with a few branching parts, and some occasional fan service.
If you like the demo and want to support the game's development, follow the official Twitter page and look forward for our next update. Also, if you want to let us know how you felt about the game use the Google Document link (in game, it's the purple document thing on the bottom right that appears after you finish the demo) to answer our feedback form. Your opinions matter.
We don't have a Patreon YET, but if you like what you see and want to support us feel free to donate. Stay tuned for news of a Patreon.
Content Warning: While not explicit or NSFW, this game may contain suggestive scenarios.
This demo is proudly brought to you by:

Writer: Libra
Art Director: 0rang3
Sprite Artists: Ryuulabo & 0rang3
Programmers: Wattson & Rairou
Editors: Nawah & Compymono

Additional Notes:

The demo is released for PC/Mac & Linux only. If you find another version then it is not by us.
If you have any bugs to report please do so in the itch.io comment section.
If you've finished the demo do take some time to answer the Google Survey to help us know what you think about the game. The link is also available in game. Look for the purple piece of paper.



https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Where_The_Demon_Lurks.html

item.title: After Years
item.description:
About the Game
After Years is an adult themed Visual Novel that features kemono (furry) characters.
The story revolves around Welkin – a young wolf who after six years finally reunites with his childhood friends during late, summer vacations.
Spend a week in the peaceful, seaside town of Rochelle and follow Welkin, who wants to make up for lost time with his friends. Make decisions that will affect the bonds between him and his three companions, with the potential of starting a romantic relationship. Love knows no bounds.
Content Warning
This game contains nudity and sexual themes between male characters and is intended for mature audiences only [+18].
Patreon Project
If you enjoy the game, please consider supporting its development by becoming a Patron. Please click here to visit my Patreon page.
Important Notices & Known Issues

This build represents a work in progress and may differ from the final product.
Important Notice: The game doesn't transfer save files between the versions, however, players will always have the option to input dialogue choices and continue from previous builds upon start up.

External Links

Changelog
Character Profiles
Contact & Bug Report
Patreon
Twitter.



https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/After_Years.html

item.title: Cryptid Crush
item.description:
Cryptid Crush is a TTRPG inspired Monster Visual Novel with eldritch elements!
As a newcomer to the seaside town of Longhope, you find yourself surrounded by monsters of urban myth. Haunted by the cat specter Taro, your journey begins alongside the wingless Jersey Devil Jamie and the pint-sized Mothman Atlas.
Cryptid Crush will feature at least FOUR monster singles, this demo highlights the dynamics between two of them.
Check out our twitter!
Major thanks to our playtesters, friends and folk heroes like you!
Note: The accessibility menu can be toggled by pressing the A key.
Self-voicing mode can be toggled by pressing the V key.


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Cryptid_Crush.html

item.title: Endless Bounty
item.description:
Follow an orc mercenary as he tracks down his next target. Drok'tar is no newbie to his work, but the bounty he's looking for can be elusive. He'll have to gather information from the townsfolk and hunt for clues in the surrounding area if he wants to rake in the gold from a job well done. Though, he might find more than just his bounty on his quest...
Endless Bounty is a point and click adventure where you lead Drok'tar through the town of Gabranth and its surrounding areas while looking for his bounty. You'll meet a slew of characters along with way, and if you play your cards right, you'll find yourself in more... erotic situations with some of them.
There are multiple endings to be found! Can you find them all?
Sexual content advisory. This game does contain content of an adult nature, including depictions of man sex. Not intended for audiences under the age of 18.
© WolfBite Interactive LLC 2019-Current Year. All Rights Reserved.
Writer/Programmer - DyneWulf - Patreon / Twitter / FurAffinity
Lead/Concept Aritst - Gavel - Twitter / FurAffinity
Sound Design - Civ Valian - SoundCloud / Twitter / FurAffinity
Thank you to Reggie, Rhum, CV, Nanabi, Toby and especially Grawl for your testing, help and input!
Special thanks to all my Patrons, cause without all of you, I couldn't do stuff like this!


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Endless_Bounty.html

item.title: HeroicSphere Episode1: CyberWolf
item.description:
Heroic Sphere is a suite of erotic visual novels [Eroge] that takes place in a futuristic cartoon world filled with hunky superhero beasts. [BARA/FURRY]
You can play the entire game for free by using the short version of the game but you will just have 1 path available.
The game features 3 Bad endings and 1 canon ending. 20k + words, No censorship, sound effects and some portraits/animation variations(no CG), multiple paths and 30-45 minutes of gameplay to unlock everything. Be aware that the game features A Lot of diverse kinks the only limit being no underage, extreme vore, gore and scat content especially for the side events. The main story will mainly focus around mind alteration and corruption.
Each episode puts you in a different character and let you share his POV of the situation while advancing the main story (no same episode with different POV)
This game is done at 100% by me with the help of some royalty free assets, sound and music. Unfortunately, I'm not an English native speaker so expect some painful grammatical errors sometime. If you have any comments, typo corrections or future updates you'll want in the game, please, come to the Discord server.
https://discord.gg/Gm2K57Pz3Z
Or contact me on my twitter: https://twitter.com/satyroom
Tag: Superhero, corruption, Bara, Gay, Erogame, Romance, Mind control, hypnosis, visual novel, Erotic Game, Visual Novel.


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/HeroicSphere_Episode1_CyberWolf.html

item.title: Lookouts
item.description:
Two lookouts meet in a desert, far from the sight of their gangs. What will become of this fateful meeting?
A short and sweet visual novel about two gay trans masc cowboys finding solace and comfort with each other while on a stakeout. Made for the Gay Western Jam hosted by Robert Yang.(Post jam update to come!)
Controls: Click or press spacebar to progress/show dialogue.
Art and designs: @Coldoggo
Code and writing: @ParanoidHawk
Music: Kevin MacLeod


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Lookouts.html

item.title: Sileo: Tales of a New Dawn
item.description:
Got a question? Be sure to check out our FAQ!
Sileo: Tales of a New Dawn is a gay furry visual novel currently in development. Escape your old life and start anew in the idyllic mountain town of Woodcrest. Reunite with an old flame, make new friends, begin a new career and perhaps even find love? Play through multiple unique novel-length storylines in which you'll overcome great obstacles, meet a litany of colorful characters and perhaps even fall in love with the man of your dreams!
Sileo originally began development in April 2020 and our first public release took place in June 2020. Since then, we've been releasing new builds with tons of additional content each and every month, and will continue to do so until the game is complete. Be sure to check back often to see what new content we have in store for you!
If you like what you see, be sure to support us on Patreon to get monthly development builds, behind the scenes updates, hi-resolution artwork and more! We'd really appreciate your support!
We will release new builds of Sileo each month. Patreon will receive new content one month ahead of the Itch builds, however bug fixes and other improvements will be identical between versions where applicable. Be sure to follow us on Twitter to keep up to date with what's coming!
Please Note: Sileo: Tales of a New Dawn is a work in progress - everything is subject to change.
Werecat Entertainment is:
Xevvy - Writing, Programming, Interface Design, Concept, Misc
CurryCatz - Artwork: Sprites, CG's & Backgrounds
Kronos - Quality Control
Found a bug? Tweet us at twitter.com/WerecatEnt so we can look into it! If you receive a 'Traceback' screen, please take a screenshot of this and tweet it to us so we can more easily figure out what went wrong.


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Sileo_TalesofaNewDawn.html

item.title: 靈魂擺渡人 / Spiritfarer
item.description:
你會如何進行臨終道別？
《Spiritfarer®》是一款關於死亡的休閒管理遊戲。你扮演逝者的船主斯特拉，也是一名靈魂擺渡者。建造一艘船去探索世界，然後幫助和關愛幽靈，最終將他們送到來世。耕種、採礦、捕魚、收割、烹飪，並用你自己的方法渡過神祕之海。加入小貓達芙迪爾的冒險之旅，開啟雙人合作模式。與你的幽靈乘客一起度過悠閒的美好時光，創造永恆的回憶，最終學會如何向你珍愛的朋友道別。

遊戲特色：

享受美麗的手繪藝術和動畫。
建造、管理和改進你的渡船。
耕種、採礦、捕魚、收割、烹飪、編織、製作！各種各樣的活動在等著你！
結識一群令人難忘的角色，帶他們上船，關愛他們，與他們建立良好的關係。
你可以採用奔跑、跳躍和滑行的方式一路闖過精心設計的平臺關卡。
探索奇幻和充滿想象力的世界。尋找和收集各種資源，以升級你的船隻併為乘客製作禮物。
體驗充滿難忘瞬間的感人故事。
放鬆幾個小時，進入舒適且令人放鬆的遊戲。花上30個小時即可完成整個遊戲，花上幾百個小時則能詳細感受《Spiritfarer》的所有細節。
遊戲內針對船隻、角色甚至是小貓都有豐富的自定義選項，助你打造獨一無二的冒險之旅！
在可選的本地合作模式下扮演小貓達芙迪爾。


加入討論組
歡迎加入我們的中文討論組！《Spiritfarer》官方玩家QQ群：1001220629


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Spiritfarer.html

item.title: 矛之酒館 / Tavern of Spear
item.description:
本遊戲主要角色 只有男性 ，而且有大量 NSFW 內容。
它將包含麝香，觸手，精神催眠，洩殖腔。
故事圍繞著一個小酒館，你控制的角色名為 “Eyvind”。
來自迷失之矛部落的年輕的成年狼戰士。
遵循部落傳統，Eyvind 離開家鄉，踏上了旅程。
您可以單擊坐在那裡的角色並與他們交談。有的角色在談話後可以和他做愛，或完成任務
"你可以透過為角色做任務來接近他們、瞭解他們。
他們都有自己的個性，與其他角色的關係、和自己相關的事件。
我添加了一些統計資料檢查，就像 DND 和輻射 1、2 一樣。
您可以在遊戲開始時分配屬性點。
統計資訊還包含“腐敗”和“性慾”，隨著統計資料的增加，可以解鎖更多場景。
在對話中，偶爾會出現技能檢查。透過還是失敗將取決於你的統計。"
（翻譯自英語）


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Tavern_of_Spear.html

item.title: The Hayseed Knight
item.description:
The story of the great Knight of the Upperfield! The bravest! The most handsome! The… yeah no.
The Hayseed Knight is a plot driven fantasy comedy visual novel created by a single person (yo!) that follows the adventures of Ader, the one eyed deer, while he desperately tries to stay on track to fulfill his dream: becoming a knight!
But he's a peasant... and pretty damn poor at that! That's not going to stop him, is it?
...WELL, it kinda is. Dreams aren't edible after all.
On a meta sense, the player is The Narrator, a character hellbent on finding out what truly happened to Ader and his friends, who are little more than legendary characters at this point.

Fully and lovingly voice acted!
Gorgeous, animated sprites!
Meet adorable, unique characters!
A detailed encyclopedia for people who love worldbuilding!
Completely safe for work. Yes really. PG 13. Please, stop asking. Please.
COMPLETELY FREE. Like the wind.

This is still very much in development, so anything is subject to change in future versions! If you want to help me develop this game, there's a patreon and any contribution is really appreciated!
Keep up with development on twitter!
-Streams and Let's Plays are really appreciated! I'd love to watch yours and share it!
-Please, do not redistribute.
Content Warnings: fantasy racism, fantasy homophobia, sexual abuse threat
Current Known Issues:

Save files NOT compatible with 1.4! (damn you encyclopaedia)
The encyclopaedia is STILL sorta ugly, but its functionality has been vastly improved since 1.4! At the cost of the save file compatibility as mentioned above.
The CG gallery has somehow turned even buggier and I don't even know how. Use at your own risk???
Audio levels may be a bit off occasionally.
No battle system yet. I THINK IT'S FUNNIER LIKE THIS AT THIS POINT, RIGHT? R-RIGHT?



https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/The_Hayseed_Knight.html

item.title: The HeartBeat
item.description:
遊戲介紹
2077年，新敦克市。
人們已經忘卻了“鴞母”的輝光，轉而投向寡頭生物科技公司——莫利格。肉體逐漸被機械取代，五感也被神經介面傳輸的訊號替換。正當人們享受著作為“改造者”的舒適生活時，一款不知從何而來的電子病毒成為了新敦克市的夢魘。
而你，是這座城市的市長。
在連續工作十日後，你那顆疲憊的心臟終於發出了最後的悲鳴。
及時趕到的祕書為你在體外橋接了一顆機械心臟，把它握在手中吧，用你最後的力量，去延續自己和這座城市的心跳。
（遊戲包含多結局）
操作說明
空格鍵 按壓心臟！廠商推薦你在節拍指示器漲滿的瞬間擠壓。
方向鍵 做出決策！告訴祕書你為這座城市做出的最後的決策。
最重要的是，努力活下去，處理完所有的檔案！


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/The_HeartBeat.html

item.title: Triple R: Rehabilitation Rational Ruined
item.description:
Resume
The game is basically a Dark Souls Visual novel, but instead of Dying repeatedly you get FUCKED repeatedly!!! This will will have multiple choices with multiple paths that will have consequences! If you do something in chapter 1, it will influence things up to chapter 10!!! So Buckle up ya naughty pup!!
Content
Buying a slot and scene, will grant you a scene and the right to write your own scene
That's Right! Commissioning Sex scenes will able you to write what your character will do, and write the dialogue, all that to give you freedom over your own custom scene! The Regular sequence is a three image sequence of your own idea. and so on! You can have as many as you want if you willing to pay! almost any kink imaginable is allowed! scene is to show one or multiple images and your scene description text right as it is shown
(The images will be similar, so the price can be reasonable to pay for)
(But if you want difference)or additional scenes it will cost extra)
Here is a list of the kinks/fetishes/ NSFW Content that is currently present in the Game can be viewed on our discord server under #game-info. Currently it has something to everyone! 65 kinks and more to come!!!


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Triple_R_Rehabilitation_Rational_Ruined.html

item.title: Timberborn
item.description:
人類在把地球變成一片乾涸的沙漠後自己滅絕了，但一些物種卻適應了嚴酷的環境並存活下來。從多種獨特的海狸種族中選擇一支，看看你的海狸社會能延續多久！
雨季和旱季
做好準備，抵禦不斷來襲的旱季。囤積食物，讓田地與森林在旱季來臨時仍然生機勃勃。利用自然水源與灌溉技術，維持土地耕作。
整治河流
未來的海狸擁有千年來流淌在基因裡的水利天賦，能夠改變河道、搭建堤壩、用炸藥轟出運河。不過要小心，失控的洪流比炸藥還要恐怖！
木匠朋克
使用木材建造精密的機械、房屋、紀念碑等。木材是 Timberborn 的核心原料，但最先進的結構需要金屬。要找到金屬，你需要派出勘探隊，去探索舊世界的廢墟。
垂直建築
用模組型垂直建築系統建立起繁榮昌盛的海狸社會。由於空間有限，你需要堆砌小屋和作坊，在山上開墾田地，並建造電力網來維持不斷擴大的社會需求。
日夜迴圈
在繁榮的海狸城市裡建造高效生產鏈以及豐富的夜生活設施。體驗單個模擬的海狸生活，在生下海狸寶寶時慶祝一番！
身心健康
滿足海狸社會的需要，提升居民的壽命和幸福度。一隻海狸的生活不應該只是“工作、睡覺、伐木”，還需要平衡飲食、裝飾、廟宇、甚至旋轉木馬。這些東西都由你來創造。
海狸社會
控制不同的海狸種族，每個種族都有獨特的風格、建築和能力。一些海狸擅長務農，其他的則依靠高速工業化來發展。選擇適合你風格的海狸種族！
地圖編輯器
使用遊戲內建地圖或建立自己的地圖並與社群分享！你可以建立不同高度的山脈、散落沙漠的廢墟、作為生命之源的水路……每張地圖都會有不同的挑戰。
……更多內容！
我們將基於玩家反饋定期釋出新內容。這是全球第一款海狸城市建築遊戲，我們會努力把它做好。請繼續保持關注，把 Timberborn 加入願望單吧！


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Timberborn.html

item.title: 浣熊硬探 / Backbone
item.description:
關於這款遊戲
這個世界最為可怕的邪惡並非人人都能對抗，要有超群的智慧，要有不屈不撓的精神，還要有極其強烈、感天動地的正義感。
可跟你有什麼關係？你只想掙夠房租。
你不是英雄，普普通通路人甲而已。只是運氣不順，撞上了倒黴的案子，還有可能是驚天大案，不想查也得查。
偵探，該幹嘛幹嘛吧。
遊戲簡介
《浣熊硬探》是一款新式黑色角色扮演偵探冒險遊戲。你將成為浣熊私家偵探霍華德·洛託，走進不列顛哥倫比亞省溫哥華，探索這個精心創作的高畫質畫素反烏托邦社會。
霍華德·洛託幹了好幾年私家偵探，可惜接手的都是雞毛碎皮的小案子，多少個寂寞的夜晚，輾轉難眠，收入微薄，只能勉強生活。眼下這樁奇怪的案子讓你的生活有了改變，起初以為只是無關緊要的夫妻恩怨，後來卻要被迫面對這座城市壓迫市民的體制結構。
遊戲玩法
《浣熊硬探》融合了現代電子遊戲和經典指向點選冒險遊戲的相關玩法，包括潛行、探索以及類似於老派CRPG的對話系統。
你將：

追尋真相，並與形形色色的角色建立有意義的聯絡
置身於高牆林立的溫哥華，探索繁華與衰敗的城區
尋找線索，蒐集證據
破解謎題，低調行事
體驗浣熊的生活

遊戲特色
新式黑色反烏托邦
《浣熊硬探》的溫哥華危險、蕭條而又陰鬱，不過並非完全喪失了希望。這個世界冰冷荒涼，但或許能靠自己的選擇去尋獲意義，間或有真誠的交流，還有永不逝去、希望促成變化的人心。所有人都想改變世界，只是有些人並不希望它變得美好。
視覺效果精緻
高畫質畫素美術配合動態光照、瓢潑大雨、濃重的霧氣和霓虹燈光，美妙絕倫，讓這座龐大的城市有了生氣。
原聲音軌引人入勝，令人難忘
原聲音軌由Danshin與Arooj Aftab專業創作而成，為你奉上氛圍濃厚而又令人拍案叫絕的電影級別聲景。你一定從未聽過這樣的反烏托邦末世爵士音樂。


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Backbone.html

item.title: Tennis Ace
item.description:
Tennis Ace is a visual novel following in the more traditional Japanese VN mold, with a lengthier prologue, a higher focus on characterization and anime-esque art.
In the game, you follow the life of an 18-year old boy who aspire to become a professional tennis player at the end of his senior year in high school.
The game has three dateable characters, all of them being part of the protagonist's inner circle of friends.
Updates will be posted here 14 days after they have been posted on Patreon, with updates coming out monthly.
If you like the art in my project, consider checking out my artist's DeviantArt here!
And if you'd like to support me on Patreon, you can find my project's page right here!
If you would like to contact me to ask me a question or anything like that, send me an email at tennisacevn@outlook.com and I'll get back to you as soon as I can. And if you have an error or typo to report, click here to contribute to the typo log!


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Tennis_Ace.html

item.title: 狐的假期 / 狐の假期
item.description:
遊戲介紹：
這是一款簡單的休閒遊戲。適合茶餘飯後，重溫童年假期生活小憩一下。
我們的主角是一隻名叫吉吉的狐狸，他有一本“神奇”的畫冊，翻開它就能重溫童年假期美好的時光。
你可以透過安排狐狸的旅行目的地，讓他可以遨遊中國的大好河山。
送給出生在80.90年代的同學們，在遊戲裡會看到許多記憶裡的物品及畫面。
遊戲特色：

精美的各地風景大圖，滿足你還沒有旅行的遺憾。
豐富的任務，讓主角在玩的過程中，幫助做家務。
朋友邀約功能，讓主角與其他夥伴一同玩耍，共同成長。
情竇初開的年紀，懵懂的愛情故事。
完成32周即可完成一週目，輕鬆有趣。
屬性成長影響角色顯示效果，高矮胖瘦甚至疲勞都有體現。

致敬逝去的童年！
送給80.90出生的同學們！


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Foxs_Holiday.html

item.title: 匿名信：失心者
item.description:
《匿名信：失心者》是一款益智解謎類遊戲，主要講述實習警探滿滿因收到一封匿名信而打破了原有的寧靜，當滿滿跟隨信件指示來到早已荒廢的十三中學時，發現一切都已經物是人非，是陷阱？還是真相？無數的祕密和曾經不為人知的往事隨著滿滿踏入校園的那一刻開始逐漸浮出水面。收集各式的道具和線索，完成複雜的解謎遊戲，最終揭開真相。請遵循本心，將謎團一一解開。到底誰才是真正的失心者？
豐富有趣的解謎玩法
場景互動解謎，角色互動解謎，邏輯推理式解謎，多線開放式解謎等多種解謎玩法融合，不僅考驗玩家的記憶力，邏輯力，更考驗玩家的洞察力和創造性思維，玩家將追隨開發者的一齊腦洞大開，探索解謎的樂趣。
精美立繪，Furry 愛好者的福音
系列作品中的角色多達12個之多，均是擬人化小動物形象。立繪精美，配合場景氛圍，使得遊戲美術別樹一幟。不僅是解謎發燒友的福利，更是 Furry 愛好者的福音。
開放式的劇情設計，讓玩家腦洞大開
玩家透過線索的蒐集和筆記本中事件的解鎖，將更加深刻的解讀該系列作品，開放式的結局設計與錯綜複雜的人物線，讓玩家腦洞大開。
密室玩法，凸顯3D場景特色
遊戲中利用3D場景的優勢，烘托出緊張懸疑的氣氛，還原密室逃脫玩法，給玩家身臨其境的體驗。


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Yuanqi_AL01__Stayer.html

item.title: 匿名信：隱匿者
item.description:
《匿名信:隱匿者》是匿名信系列冒險解謎遊戲的第二部。
故事承接《匿名信:失心者》主角狐狸滿滿發現了有人在學校的地下實驗室進行祕密實驗，誤觸了毒氣機關。被人送往了醫院，恢復後又發現了一封匿名信指引他們去到一箇中餐館——中華樓。透過一系列探索發現中華樓已經被人改造過，而且一切似乎都源於一棵不正常的巨樹...這背後到底隱藏著什麼？
此部作品保持了原有益智解謎，冒險敘事的特點上增強了3D場景解謎與角色互動玩法。
偵探的筆記本中加入了角色側寫，線索分析，事件記錄等功能便於解謎玩家與喜歡閱讀故事的玩家細心拓展。
Furry 愛好者可以透過漫畫和冒險敘事更完整的瞭解此係列的世界觀，作品中隱藏了諸多彩蛋還需要各位玩家細心查詢。
遊戲特色
豐富有趣的解謎玩法
場景互動解謎，角色互動解謎，邏輯推理式解謎，多線開放式解謎等多種解謎玩法融合，不僅考驗玩家的記憶力，邏輯力，更考驗玩家的洞察力和創造性思維，玩家將追隨開發者的一齊腦洞大開，探索解謎的樂趣。
精美立繪，Furry 愛好者的福音
系列作品中的角色多達12個之多，均是擬人化小動物形象。立繪精美，配合場景氛圍，使得遊戲美術別樹一幟。不僅是解謎發燒友的福利，更是 Furry 愛好者的福音。
開放式的劇情設計，讓玩家腦洞大開
玩家透過線索的蒐集和筆記本中事件的解鎖，將更加深刻的解讀該系列作品，開放式的結局設計與錯綜複雜的人物線，讓玩家腦洞大開。
密室玩法，凸顯3D場景特色
遊戲中利用3D場景的優勢，烘托出緊張懸疑的氣氛，還原密室逃脫玩法，給玩家身臨其境的體驗。


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Yuanqi_AL02__Anonymous_Letter_Prowler.html

item.title: Shelter
item.description:
Awoo, traveler! Welcome to Shelter!
It's a furry visual novel about a bunch of those medieval fantasy dogs and a human who made their home at a mysterious, gigantic metal structure filled with futuristic technology in the middle of fantasy Siberia.
The game takes place during the preparations for their version of fireworks night, by using a life-force fueled turret of mass destruction. I swear it makes sense in context!
It's nsfw and I think it'll satisfy dog-lovers. eyebrow wiggles
I've been a fan of visual novels long before I even found out about the existence of the furry fandom, so I always wanted to make one. I do pretty much everything on my own in this one: designing and drawing character sprites and background, the writing and background music. I hope to improve in all of those areas over time!
For the most up-to-date build check out: https://www.patreon.com/raus where I post like a month in advance. It also gives you an invitation to our amazing Discord den where I post extra content and we have chill times. :)
If you'd like to follow me on FA and Twitter, I have those too!

FA: https://www.furaffinity.net/user/raus/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ (nsfw) and https://twitter.com/Vuffski (sfw)

Awoo~!


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Shelter.html

item.title: Winds of Change
item.description:
Winds of Change is a 2D Visual Novel/Point-and-Click Adventure Game set in a living, breathing fantasy world. Embark on the journey of a lifetime! Join The Rebellion, amass an army, and liberate the world! Fully voice acted, with romance options, side quests, and optional content! Inspired by Dragon Age and Mass Effect. A huge amount of dialogue choices let you role play exactly as you want! Huge conversational trees! A game-changing 2D adventure project!
STORY
You are The Seer of Valinorth.
Blessed by the realm of spirits, you are given visions of the future in order to steer your nation's history down the right path. However, one night, a vision shakes the very foundation of everything you know. Forced to leave your home for good, you are thrust into the larger world of Alestia, and taken in by the arms of The Rebellion. Vying for freedom from the tyrannical rulers of the world – The Triumvirate -- The Rebellion fights for liberation.
At the center of this conflict is the mysterious “Blade of Exodus”. Once belonging to The Triumvirate themselves, it seems the key to victory may lie in using their own weapon against them. But who can wield an artifact of such immense power? Is victory really within reach, or will The Rebellion fall and be lost to history? The fate of everything rests on your shoulders alone, Seer.
Choose wisely, and enjoy your adventure...
FEATURES

In-Depth point and click interface!
Massive story line set in an incredible fantasy world!
Fully voice acted by a stellar cast!
Bond with your comrades!
Pursue friendships, and even romances! (not limited by gender)
Non-linear story flow! Feel free to stop and explore!
Open world atmosphere. Return to past areas at any time!
Find hidden objects and books in the environment! Learn about the world!
Stop and chat with your party members at any time!
Watch your party members interact with each other in skits!
View parallel scenes taking place all across the world! Multiple stories at play!
Experience side quests and optional stories!

ABOUT THE VOICE ACTING
Winds of Change features a massive voice cast, featuring top talent from the industry!
Voice actors in Winds of Change are best known for performing in franchises/games such as:

The Legend of Zelda
Persona 5
Fairy Tail
Hunter x Hunter
Danganronpa
Zero Escape
Gundam
Mob Psycho 100
One Punch Man
One Piece
Secret of Mana
Fire Emblem
Re:ZERO
Dust: An Elysian Tail



https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Winds_of_Change.html

item.title: 林中之夜 / Night in the Woods
item.description:
大學輟學的梅·博羅夫斯基回到了搖搖欲墜的小鎮波瑟姆·斯普林斯。這裡曾經是一座礦業小鎮，她想要恢復她以前漫無目的的生活，並和她留下的朋友們重新建立聯絡。但事情不一樣了。現在的家似乎不同了，她的朋友們也長大了、變了。樹葉落了，風也越來越冷了。隨著光線的消退，奇怪的事情發生了。
樹林裡有什麼東西。
《林中之夜》是一款以探索、故事和人物為主題的冒險遊戲，在一個鬱鬱蔥蔥、生機勃勃的世界裡，與幾十個人物見面，做很多要做的事情。透過一次成功的 Kickstarter 眾籌，本遊戲最終由 Infinite Fall 製作完成，這是一個由 Alec Holowka（Aquaria）、Scott Benson（Late Night Work Club）和 Bethany Hockenberry 組成的團隊。


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Night_in_the_Woods.html

item.title: A Walk Home
item.description:
When a male stripper is going home on a full moon night, many NPCs wants to fuck him.

The download is >1GB, be aware of that!
You will need a somewhat decent gaming rig in order to play. Nothing too fancy, but just don't expect the game to run smoothly with onboard graphics or something like that.
So, here we go. My first venture into the world of Video Games! Fun! :3
I am really excited about this. I always wanted to make a Video Game. Since this is my first time doing something like this, don't expect all too much. It will be a tad buggy, a tad ugly, and a tad poorly optimized. But I made it and I'm proud of it :)
I'll plan on doing more Games, or at least interactive experiences, in the future, it was real fun! Let me know what you think!

I also added a cheat menu! If you lost your save through a bug you still can continue where you left off! Or... you know, just skip a level that pisses you off or unlock all statues if you don't feel like doing it yourself. No shame in that!
To Acess the cheat menu (spoiler warning!) - After you start up the game just type cum real fast on your keyboard as soon as the main title appears, but before the foxy starts walking in from the left.

If you have fun with the game, please consider buying me a coffey over at: https://ko-fi.com/Kemonokun
or check out my Patreon Page: https://www.patreon.com/kemonokun


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/A_Walk_Home.html

item.title: Sexy Mad Science
item.description:
Sexy Mad Science is the story of a lowly intern (you), attempting to become a Sexy Mad Scientist. Basically you mess with your new boss' older brother and earn points.


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Sexy_Mad_Science.html

9:22 是一部神祕視覺小說，以 2010 年的北美洲為故事背景。
Spencer，一個患有慢性失眠症的大一新生，努力維持著他的新生活。在第一學期第三週後，他幾乎不再結交新朋友，不再嘗試新事物，也放棄了招聘者告訴他可以追求的一切東西。某日清晨，他如往常一樣睡過了頭，時鐘顯示在 9:22。就在那天，一切似乎都不太對勁。然而，在他真正進入校園後，事情開始變得分崩離析。
使用 itch.io 下面的連結下載遊戲，或點選這裡直接在你的瀏覽器裡遊玩。
如果你有任何問題，或者在遊戲中發現了錯字，或者只想簡單問個好，請在 Twitter 上給我留言。


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/9_22.html

item.title: 獵鷹城 / Falcon City
item.description:
你就是法律！
獵鷹城正在醞釀著一場動亂。而你是追蹤這件事的一名超級偵探——庫爾特塔克。你可能是一隻對未來心灰意冷的兔子，尖酸機智，老闆的眼中釘，但你對自己的工作相當遊刃有餘。
由於沒有可靠的目擊者和證據，找到一個被綁架的受害者並不容易。你能破解此案嗎?
穿上你的偵探靴！
探察這片城市叢林，你會遇到一群有趣的人 – 有的會給你幫助，有的充滿危險，還有的則行為怪異。為了推動案子，你要找到線索和解決謎團，然後與警局裡的同事討論來獲得新思路。你做出的決定會影響故事的走向，要是表現得好，你甚至還能從中邂逅愛情。
一場獨一無二，充滿心計、戲劇和幽默的黑色冒險在等著你。是時候潛入並解開謎團了，偵探！獵鷹城需要你的幫助!
遊戲特色

點選式操作讓此類冒險遊戲變得出色！
迷人的藝術風格，手繪的角色、環境和動畫!
完整的角色配音和原創音樂!
根據你的決定和表現，故事會有不同的結尾!



https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Falcon_City.html

item.title: 野狼謎蹤 / 野狼迷蹤 / WolfQuest
item.description:
一個關於生活在黃石公園裡的狼的遊戲
你是一頭年輕的灰狼，出生在黃石國家公園的北部，你已經在狼群裡學會了狼的生存之道。現在，該是你離開家庭獨自開始旅程的時候了，去探險、狩獵、尋找伴侶，建立領地、組建和養育自己的家庭吧。
故事
你的探索之旅開始於紫晶山的山坡上，你必須在此處測試你的狩獵技巧，這裡有麋鹿，駝鹿和騾鹿供你練手。一旦你成為一個熟練的獵手，你就可以尋找其他狼夥伴並結為伴侶。
接下來你們將共同穿越拉馬爾山谷北方的山脈，到達斯勞溪。在那裡建立一個領地，養一窩小狼：訓練它們，哺育它們，並時刻保護它們免受捕食者的傷害，最後帶著它們歷經漫漫長路來到夏日家園。
你的家族能夠倖存嗎？
體驗黃石公園
在野狼謎蹤真實復刻的世界裡盡情探索黃石國家公園的北部區域，麋鹿和其他有蹄類獸群在灌木蒿草原，高山森林和壯麗的高脊上悠然漫步。
但是要小心那些陌生的狼群，它們巡視著自己的領地且敵視任何闖入者。不僅如此，大自然還遍佈著其他危險——灰熊，美洲獅，郊狼，任何與你爭奪領地和食物的動物。
獨自或與朋友一起玩野狼謎蹤！
在單人遊戲中，學習如何狩獵，與其他狼交流，尋找伴侶，建立領地，養育幼崽，最後踏上危險的旅程前往夏日地點。
在多人遊戲中，與大家組成狼群一起探索野外，狩獵，建立領地，養育幼崽，一同前往夏日地點。


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/WolfQuest.html

item.title: 阿努比斯與湮沒之骨 / Anubis and the Buried Bone
item.description:
Explore an egyptian themed authentic retro action-adventure platformer.
Powerful souls have escaped Anubis's clutches, so he has to hunt them down, enhancing his abilities along the way by discovering numerous items and unlocking secrets. In the style of classic 8-bit action-adventure games, Anubis and the Buried Bone offers an open world that you decide how to conquer. Be wary, though, because Anubis's difficulty is as authentic as its graphics! Scour the world for its secrets and gain the advantage over your enemies, enhancing Anubis's abilities with dozens of unique treasures.


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Anubis_And_The_Buried_Bone.html

item.title: Rack
item.description:
Rack is a science-themed bondage game where you can perform sexual tests and experiments using a variety of toys and gadgets. As you play the game, you'll unlock new features, lab settings, and test subjects to play with.
The game features a massive variety of test subjects of all genders and species, including human characters. It also supports custom character importing, which means there are lots of user-created characters available.
You can get your own character added to the game by keeping an eye on my FurAffinity account, where I occasionally hold character auctions. If you're artistically inclined and have access to Flash Pro CS6 or higher, you can also make your own character using the template files, which are available to the public completely free-of-charge.


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Rack.html

item.title: Arches
item.description:
《Arches》包含成人主題，您必須年滿 18 歲才能遊玩。《Arches》可能會導致強烈刺激，可能並不適合所有人。遊戲存在吸毒，精神疾病和恐怖元素，並伴隨暴力畫面與描述。在下載之前，請認真確認並考慮到您的心理健康！
一對伴侶來到迴音鎮做一些超自然事件的調查，這座小鎮自從集體癔症爆發後已經廢棄了五年。儘管如此，一些邪惡的東西仍然潛伏在這座小鎮之中，足以使恐懼延續下去。
《Arches》是一個獨立故事，講述的是迴音鎮事件發生以後的故事。


https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Arches.html

item.title: 爪印 / Paws
item.description:
在《paws》裡你將扮演一隻走失的小山貓，穿越廣闊而險峻的地形，抵禦沿途而來的捕食者的威脅，尋找回家之路。在《Shelter 2》的擴充套件世界裡開始一段獨立冒險之旅吧！
黑暗和塵垢，彎彎曲曲穿過藤曼，
用策略和辛苦躲過危險。
沒有力量，沒有智慧，
找到回到熟悉土地上家的路。
本遊戲結合了備受喜愛的《Shelter》系列的所有獨特元素，為大家呈現一個關於迷失、友誼、與尋找失去的愛的故事。
主要特色：

奇幻場景中扣人心絃的線性體驗。
第一次在《Shelter》的世界裡扮演一隻山貓幼崽，在同伴的幫助下克服這個世界的所有難題與阻礙。
包括使用感知能力來跟隨足跡在內的新的遊戲玩法。
以平臺遊戲機製為核心，探索世界的全新角落。
Retro Family 製作的全新原創音樂。



https://utopicpanther.surge.sh/fgi-next/zh-tw/games/Paws.html
